chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7794 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on CMA No.1889/2023 2.For order on office objection. 3.For hearing of CMA No.33027/2022 4.For hearing of main case. 17.03.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr.Ameer Bukhsh Metlo, Advocate for Respondent. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Syed Amir Ali Shah Jeelani, Advocate for Respondent. Per learned counsel for the respondent this matter does not fall within the ambit of this Court and it does not exercise the territorial jurisdiction for the lis. Be that as it may, this fiscal petition is pending since 2022 without any significant progress and even today the petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge nasir
